name: Las Fierbinţi
plot: Acţiunea se petrece în satul Fierbinţi, acolo unde existenţa locuitorilor se desfăşoară lent, într-un paradis rural care s-a adaptat, în stil pur românesc, la vremurile moderne. Viceprimarul Vasile vrea să îi ia locul actualului primar şi se bazează pe sprijinul cârciumarului Bobiţă şi al prietenului acestuia, Giani, şmecheraşul tipic de provincie. Celentano, Firicel a lu' Cimpoaie, Ardiles şi Moş Peleus, beţivii satului, sunt apariţii colorate şi pline de umor.
cast: Bobonete Mihai, Mihai Rait, Constantin Diţă, Adrian Văncică, Anca Dumitra

name: Asia Express
plot: Asia Express is the Romanian version of the reality show Peking Express which was created in 2004.
cast: Irina Fodor, Marius Damian

name: iUmor
plot: The show that proves that Romanian's imagination has no barriers! Delia and Cheloo award the best humor number with 20,000 euros.
cast: Delia Matache, Cătălin Ștefan Ion, Cătălin Bordea, Cosmin Natanticu

name: The Blacklist
plot: Raymond "Red" Reddington, one of the FBI's most wanted fugitives, surrenders in person at FBI Headquarters in Washington, D.C. He claims that he and the FBI have the same interests: bringing down dangerous criminals and terrorists. In the last two decades, he's made a list of criminals and terrorists that matter the most but the FBI cannot find because it does not know they exist. Reddington calls this "The Blacklist". Reddington will co-operate, but insists that he will speak only to Elizabeth Keen, a rookie FBI profiler.
cast: James Spader, Diego Klattenhoff, Hisham Tawfiq, Anya Banerjee, Harry Lennix

name: Lost in Space
plot: After crash-landing on an alien planet, the Robinson family fights against all odds to survive and escape. But they're surrounded by hidden dangers.
cast: Toby Stephens, Molly Parker, Maxwell Jenkins, Taylor Russell, Mina Sundwall

name: Black Summer
plot: In the dark, early days of a zombie apocalypse, complete strangers band together to find the strength they need to survive and get back to loved ones.
cast: Jaime King, Christine Lee, Zoe Marlett

name: Britannia
plot: An epic drama set in 43AD as the Roman Imperial Army – determined and terrified in equal measure - returns to crush the Celtic heart of Britannia - a mysterious land ruled by warrior women and powerful druids who can channel the powerful forces of the underworld. Or so they say.
cast: Kelly Reilly, David Morrissey, Nikolaj Lie Kaas, Zoë Wanamaker, Stanley Weber

name: Marvel's Daredevil
plot: Lawyer-by-day Matt Murdock uses his heightened senses from being blinded as a young boy to fight crime at night on the streets of Hell’s Kitchen as Daredevil.
cast: Charlie Cox, Deborah Ann Woll, Elden Henson, Vincent D'Onofrio, Jay Ali

name: Diablero
plot: A young priest enlists the help of a demon hunter and a paranormal expert to search for a kidnapped girl in the underworld of Mexico City.
cast: Gisselle Kuri, Christopher Von Uckermann, Horacio García Rojas, Fátima Molina

name: The Tomorrow People
plot: The story of several young people from around the world who represent the next stage in human evolution, possessing special powers, including the ability to teleport and communicate with each other telepathically. Together they work to defeat the forces of evil.
cast: Robbie Amell, Peyton List, Luke Mitchell, Aaron Yoo, Madeleine Mantock

name: Westworld
plot: A dark odyssey about the dawn of artificial consciousness and the evolution of sin. Set at the intersection of the near future and the reimagined past, it explores a world in which every human appetite, no matter how noble or depraved, can be indulged.
cast: Evan Rachel Wood, Thandiwe Newton, Jeffrey Wright, Tessa Thompson, Aaron Paul

name: Bard of Blood
plot: Years after a disastrous job in Baluchistan, a former Indian spy must confront his past when he returns to lead an unsanctioned hostage-rescue mission.
cast: Emraan Hashmi, Sobhita Dhulipala, Shishir Sharma, Abhishekh Khan, Danish Husain

name: Cobra Kai
plot: This Karate Kid sequel series picks up 30 years after the events of the 1984 All Valley Karate Tournament and finds Johnny Lawrence on the hunt for redemption by reopening the infamous Cobra Kai karate dojo. This reignites his old rivalry with the successful Daniel LaRusso, who has been working to maintain the balance in his life without mentor Mr. Miyagi.
cast: William Zabka, Ralph Macchio, Courtney Henggeler, Xolo Mariduena, Tanner Buchanan

name: Cocaine Coast
plot: It takes place in the Galicia (Spain) of the 80s, when the fishing sector was transformed and many of the shipowners became indebted. This situation will be favorable for the start of activities such as contraband and drug trafficking.
cast: Javier Rey, Tristán Ulloa, Carlos Blanco, Jana Pérez, Tamar Novas

name: Doom Patrol
plot: The Doom Patrol’s members each suffered horrible accidents that gave them superhuman abilities — but also left them scarred and disfigured. Traumatized and downtrodden, the team found purpose through The Chief, who brought them together to investigate the weirdest phenomena in existence — and to protect Earth from what they find.
cast: Diane Guerrero, April Bowlby, Joivan Wade, Skye Roberts, Riley Shanahan

name: House
plot: Dr. Gregory House, a drug-addicted, unconventional, misanthropic medical genius, leads a team of diagnosticians at the fictional Princeton–Plainsboro Teaching Hospital in New Jersey.
cast: Hugh Laurie, Robert Sean Leonard, Omar Epps, Jesse Spencer, Odette Annable

name: Krypton
plot: Set two generations before the destruction of the legendary Man of Steel’s home planet, Krypton follows Superman’s grandfather — whose House of El was ostracized and shamed — as he fights to redeem his family’s honor and save his beloved world from chaos.
cast: Cameron Cuffe, Georgina Campbell, Shaun Sipos, Wallis Day, Ann Ogbomo

name: Money Heist
plot: To carry out the biggest heist in history, a mysterious man called The Professor recruits a band of eight robbers who have a single characteristic: none of them has anything to lose. Five months of seclusion - memorizing every step, every detail, every probability - culminate in eleven days locked up in the National Coinage and Stamp Factory of Spain, surrounded by police forces and with dozens of hostages in their power, to find out whether their suicide wager will lead to everything or nothing.
cast: Úrsula Corberó, Itziar Ituño, Álvaro Morte, Pedro Alonso, Miguel Herrán

name: Lucifer
plot: Bored and unhappy as the Lord of Hell, Lucifer Morningstar abandoned his throne and retired to Los Angeles, where he has teamed up with LAPD detective Chloe Decker to take down criminals. But the longer he's away from the underworld, the greater the threat that the worst of humanity could escape.
cast: Tom Ellis, Lauren German, Kevin Alejandro, D.B. Woodside, Lesley-Ann Brandt

name: Marco Polo
plot: An epic adventure that follows the early years of the famous explorer as he travels the exotic Silk Road to the great Kublai Khan’s court. But Marco soon finds that navigating the Khan’s world of greed, betrayal, sexual intrigue and rivalry will be his greatest challenge yet, even as he becomes a trusted companion to the Khan in his violent quest to become the Emperor of the World.
cast: Lorenzo Richelmy, Benedict Wong, Joan Chen, Remy Hii, Zhu Zhu

name: Marvel's Inhumans
plot: After the Royal Family of Inhumans is splintered by a military coup, they barely escape to Hawaii where their surprising interactions with the lush world and humanity around them may prove to not only save them, but Earth itself.
cast: Anson Mount, Serinda Swan, Iwan Rheon, Isabelle Cornish, Ken Leung

name: Marvel's The Punisher
plot: A former Marine out to punish the criminals responsible for his family's murder finds himself ensnared in a military conspiracy.
cast: Jon Bernthal, Ben Barnes, Amber Rose Revah, Josh Stewart, Jason R. Moore

name: Messiah
plot: Un ofițer CIA precaut investighează un bărbat carismatic care declanșează o mișcare spirituală și stârnește tulburări politice. Cine este el mai exact? Și ce vrea el?
cast: Mehdi Dehbi, Michelle Monaghan, John Ortiz, Tomer Sisley, Stefania LaVie Owen

name: The Act
plot: A seasonal anthology series that tells startling, stranger-than-fiction true crime stories with the first season following Gypsy Blanchard, a girl trying to escape the toxic relationship she has with her overprotective mother.
cast: Patricia Arquette, Joey King, AnnaSophia Robb, Chloë Sevigny, Calum Worthy

name: Lupin
plot: Inspired by the adventures of Arsène Lupin, gentleman thief Assane Diop sets out to avenge his father for an injustice inflicted by a wealthy family.
cast: Omar Sy

name: Vlad
plot: Adrian, a young man who was unjustly jailed after his friends betrayed him during a heist, gets the chance at a new life, guided by Caesar, his mentor.
cast: Adrian Nartea, Anghel Damian, Emilian Oprea, Andrei Aradits, Olimpia Melinte

name: Game of Thrones
plot: Seven noble families fight for control of the mythical land of Westeros. Friction between the houses leads to full-scale war. All while a very ancient evil awakens in the farthest north. Amidst the war, a neglected military order of misfits, the Night's Watch, is all that stands between the realms of men and icy horrors beyond.
cast: Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, Lena Headey, Emilia Clarke

name: Barbarians
plot: Three people's fates are interwoven in the Battle of the Teutoburg Forest in 9 A.D., during which Germanic warriors halt the spread of the Roman Empire.
cast: Laurence Rupp, Jeanne Goursaud, David Schütter, Gaetano Aronica, Bernhard Schütz

name: Frontier
plot: Lupta haotică și violentă pentru a controla bogăția și puterea în comerțul cu blănuri din America de Nord în Canada de la sfârșitul secolului al XVIII-lea. Povestită din mai multe perspective, Frontier are loc într-o lume în care negocierile de afaceri s-ar putea rezolva prin lupte la sferturi la secure și în care relațiile delicate dintre triburile native și europeni pot declanșa conflicte sângeroase.
cast: Jason Momoa, Landon Liboiron, Alun Armstrong, Jessica Matten, Zoe Boyle

name: La Révolution
plot: 1787, Franța. În timp ce investighează o serie de crime misterioase, Joseph Guillotin – viitorul inventator al celebrei „ghilotine” – descoperă un virus necunoscut: Sângele Albastru. Boala se răspândește rapid în rândul aristocrației franceze, împingându-i să ucidă oameni obișnuiți și în curând duce la o rebeliune.
cast: Amir el Kacem, Marilou Aussilloux, Lionel Erdogan, Isabel Aimé González Sola, Julien Frison

name: Survivor Romania
plot:
Survivor România is a Romanian reality game show based on the international Survivor format. The season premiered on 18 January 2020 on Kanal D.

Following the basic premise of other international versions of the format, it features a group of contestants who are marooned in an isolated location, where they must provide food, water, fire, and shelter for themselves. The contestants compete in challenges for rewards and immunity from elimination. The contestants are progressively eliminated from the game until only one remains and is given the title of "Sole Survivor" and awarded the grand prize. The first two seasons's "Sole Survivor" received the prize of €50.000. By the third season, the prize for the winner got bumped up to €100.000.
cast: Daniel Pavel

name: Warrior Nun
plot: After waking up in a morgue, an orphaned teen discovers she now possesses superpowers as the chosen Halo-Bearer for a secret sect of demon-hunting nuns.
cast: Alba Baptista, Thekla Reuten, Lorena Andrea, Kristina Tonteri-Young, Tristán Ulloa

name: Adela
plot: Adela a new fiction series produced by Ruxandra Ion and Dream Film Production, it is an adaptation of the series O hayat Benim / This is my life, produced by Fox Turcia.
cast: Mara Oprea, Oana Mosneagu, Alecsandru Dunaev, Mihai Călin, Marian Râlea

name: Insula Iubirii
plot: Couples, temptations and an island full of traps, these are the key elements of the reality show presented by Radu Vâlcan. In the end, only true love can pass the test, and the couples entering the competition will find out if they are connected only by habit or, on the contrary, by sincere and strong feelings. The ultimate test of love and trust will be given by the couples who will return from Thailand totally changed.
cast: Radu Vâlcan

name: Jocul Cuvintelor
plot: Kanal D îi provoacă pe români la cel mai uşor de înţeles quiz show din istoria televiziunii, “Jocul cuvintelor”! Dan Negru, charismaticul maestru de ceremonii al emisiunii, îi invită pe telespectatori să îşi exerseze mintea în cea mai frumoasă joacă, atractivă tocmai prin simplitatea ei. Nicicând nu a fost mai uşor şi mai plăcut să îţi antrenezi mintea, în compania unuia dintre cei mai iubiţi oameni de televiziune din România
cast: Dan Negru

name: Pe Bune?
plot: Cel mai cool quiz-show al momentului aduce o supradoză de curiozități: 12 runde de întrebări trăsnite, fiecare cu 3 variante de răspuns! O oră de râs ajută la arderea a 160 de calorii, așa că nimeni altul decât Andi Moisescu ne menține în formă prezentând o demență de concurs!

name: Românii au talent
plot: Românii au talent is a TV show which first aired on 18 February 2011. The project is a franchise of Got Talent, developed by Simco Limited. The hosts of the show are Smiley and Pavel Bartoş. The judges are the Romanian singer Andra, a Pro TV star and presenter Andi Moisescu, TV presenter Mihai Petre and Florin Calinescu,Romanian actor, theatre director and television host. The grand prize is 120.000€.
cast: Andra, Andi Moisescu, Smiley, Pavel Bartoș

name: Vacanta Mare: te vreau langa Leana
X Factor Romania
plot: X Factor este o competiție românească televizată care își propune să găsească noi talente muzicale vocale. Emisiunea este difuzată de Antena 1 și face parte din franciza internațională The X Factor, al cărei format a fost creat în anul 2004 de Simon Cowell. „Factorul X” menționat în titlu se referă la o trăsătură indefinibilă care atrage calitatea de star.

name: Power
plot: A successful New York entrepreneur lives a double life as the head of a drug empire that serves only the rich and influential, all while wanting to escape the underworld and keep his family safe.
cast: Omari Hardwick, Joseph Sikora, Naturi Naughton, Larenz Tate, Shane Johnson

name: Teen Wolf
plot: Scott McCall, a high school student living in the town of Beacon Hills has his life drastically changed when he's bitten by a werewolf, becoming one himself. He must henceforth learn to balance his problematic new identity with his day-to-day teenage life. The following characters are instrumental to his struggle: Stiles, his best friend; Allison, his love interest who comes from a family of werewolf hunters; and Derek, a mysterious werewolf with a dark past. Throughout the series, he strives to keep his loved ones safe while maintaining normal relationships with them.
cast: Tyler Posey, Holland Roden, Shelley Hennig, Dylan Sprayberry, Linden Ashby

name: Shadows
plot: Relu is a family man. He has two children, a wife and a double life. Seen through the eyes of his family, Relu Oncescu appears to be an ordinary taxi driver. No one suspects that Relu works as a collector for Capitanu', a local mobster. Neither of the two worlds (his family and the mafia) knows of the other's existence. Relu manages to keep everything under control, but not for long. After accidentally killing a man, he tries to get out of the underworld, but he can't find his way back. Day by day, the secrets he keeps become increasingly oppressive and the lies begin to surface, one by one.
cast: Șerban Pavlu

name: The Flash
plot: După ce un accelerator de particule provoacă o furtună ciudată, investigatorul CSI Barry Allen este lovit de fulger și intră în comă. Luni mai târziu, se trezește cu puterea super-vitezei, oferindu-i capacitatea de a se deplasa prin Central City ca un înger păzitor nevăzut. Deși inițial entuziasmat de noile sale puteri, Barry este șocat să descopere că nu este singurul „meta-om” care a fost creat în urma exploziei acceleratorului – și nu toată lumea își folosește noile puteri pentru bine. Barry este partener cu S.T.A.R. Laboratoarele și își dedică viața pentru a-i proteja pe cei nevinovați. Deocamdată, doar câțiva prieteni apropiați și asociați știu că Barry este literalmente cel mai rapid om în viață, dar nu va trece mult până când lumea va afla ce a devenit Barry Allen... The Flash.
cast: Grant Gustin, Candice Patton, Danielle Panabaker, Danielle Nicolet, Kayla Compton

name: The Serpent
plot: The remarkable story of how murderer Charles Sobhraj was captured. As the chief suspect in unsolved murders of young Western travellers across India, Thailand and Nepal’s ‘Hippie Trail’ in 1975 and 1976, Sobhraj had repeatedly slipped from the grasp of authorities worldwide to become Interpol's most wanted man, with arrest warrants on three different continents.
cast: Tahar Rahim, Jenna Coleman, Ellie Bamber, Billy Howle, Mathilde Warnier

name: The Witcher
plot: "Later it was said that the man came from the north from the Powroznicza gate. He walked on foot, and led his horse, which was laden, by the bridle. It was late afternoon and the stalls of the ropemakers and saddlers were already closed, and the street was empty. It was warm, and the man was wearing a black cloak thrown over his shoulders. He was drawing attention." - So begins the short story "The Witcher" by Andrzej Sapkowski, which gave rise to a seven-volume series.
cast: Michał Żebrowski, Wieslaw Chmielinski, Magdalena Warzecha, Wojciech Duryasz, Władysław Barański

name: Sex/Life
plot: A woman's daring sexual past collides with her married-with-kids present when the bad-boy ex she can't stop fantasizing about crashes back into her life.
cast: Sarah Shahi, Mike Vogel, Adam Demos, Margaret Odette

name: Salvation
plot: An MIT grad student and a tech superstar bring a low-level Pentagon official a staggering discovery that an asteroid is just six months away from colliding with Earth.
cast: Santiago Cabrera, Jennifer Finnigan, Charlie Rowe, Jacqueline Byers, Ian Anthony Dale

name: For All Mankind
plot: Explore an aspirational world where NASA and the space program remained a priority and a focal point of our hopes and dreams as told through the lives of NASA astronauts, engineers, and their families.
cast: Joel Kinnaman, Toby Kebbell, Krys Marshall, Edi Gathegi, Cynthy Wu

name: The Mandalorian
plot: After the fall of the Galactic Empire, lawlessness has spread throughout the galaxy. A lone gunfighter makes his way through the outer reaches, earning his keep as a bounty hunter.
cast: Pedro Pascal, Katee Sackhoff

name: Firefly Lane
plot: For decades, childhood best friends Kate and Tully have weathered life's storms together -- until a betrayal threatens to break them apart for good.
cast: Katherine Heigl, Sarah Chalke, Ben Lawson, Beau Garrett, Roan Curtis

name: Locke & Key
plot: Three siblings who move into their ancestral estate after their father's gruesome murder discover their new home's magical keys, which must be used in their stand against an evil creature who wants the keys and their powers.
cast: Darby Stanchfield, Emilia Jones, Jackson Robert Scott, Connor Jessup, Petrice Jones

name: Ragnarok
plot: A small Norwegian town experiencing warm winters and violent downpours seems to be headed for another Ragnarök -- unless someone intervenes in time.
cast: David Alexander Sjøholt, Jonas Strand Gravli, Herman Tømmeraas, Theresa Frostad Eggesbø, Henriette Steenstrup

name: The Haunting of Bly Manor
plot: After an au pair’s tragic death, Henry Wingrave hires a young American nanny to care for his orphaned niece and nephew who reside at Bly Manor with the estate’s chef Owen, groundskeeper Jamie and housekeeper, Mrs. Grose. But all is not as it seems at the manor, and centuries of dark secrets of love and loss are waiting to be unearthed in this chilling tale.
cast: Victoria Pedretti, Oliver Jackson-Cohen, Henry Thomas, Amelia Eve, T'Nia Miller

name: The Healing Powers of Dude
plot: Noah, an 11-year-old boy with social anxiety disorder, has to start middle school, he turns to a mutt named Dude, a sarcastic emotional support dog who might need Noah as much as Noah needs him.
cast: Jace Chapman, Gabrielle Quinn, Sophie Kim, Larisa Oleynik, Mauricio Lara

name: The Letter for the King
plot: A young boy holds the fate of the kingdom in his hands when he embarks on a quest to deliver a secret message in this sweeping fantasy series.
cast: Amir Wilson, Ruby Ashbourne Serkis, Thaddea Graham, Islam Bouakkaz, Jonah Lees

name: The Queen's Gambit
plot: In a 1950s orphanage, a young girl reveals an astonishing talent for chess and begins an unlikely journey to stardom while grappling with addiction.
cast: Anya Taylor-Joy, Chloe Pirrie

name: Star Wars: Andor
plot: The tale of the burgeoning rebellion against the Empire and how people and planets became involved. In an era filled with danger, deception and intrigue, Cassian Andor embarks on the path that is destined to turn him into a rebel hero.
cast: Diego Luna, Stellan Skarsgård, Kyle Soller, Adria Arjona, Genevieve O'Reilly
genre: Sci-Fi & Fantasy, Action & Adventure, War & Politics

name: The Staircase
plot: An exploration of the life of Michael Peterson, his sprawling North Carolina family, and the suspicious death of his wife, Kathleen Peterson.
cast: Colin Firth, Toni Collette, Michael Stuhlbarg, Dane DeHaan, Olivia DeJonge

name: The Endgame
plot: A high-stakes thriller about Elena Federova, a very recently captured international arms dealer and brilliant criminal mastermind who even in captivity orchestrates a number of coordinated bank heists, and Val Turner, the principled, relentless and socially outcast FBI agent who will stop at nothing to foil her ambitious plan.
cast: Morena Baccarin, Ryan Michelle Bathe, Kamal Angelo Bolden, Costa Ronin, Noah Bean

name: Ted Lasso
plot: Ted Lasso, an American football coach, moves to England when he’s hired to manage a soccer team—despite having no experience. With cynical players and a doubtful town, will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way?
cast: Jason Sudeikis, Hannah Waddingham, Jeremy Swift, Phil Dunster, Brett Goldstein

name: MasterChef România
plot: MasterChef România is the Romanian version of the television cooking game show, open to amateur and home chefs.

name: Morocco: Love in Times of War
plot: Oblivious to the strife that awaits them, a group of young nurses from Spain's upper class head to war-torn Marocco in 1921 to help where help is needed. Many lessons in love and life are learned before they overcome deepest conflicts, grow as human beings and find out what they really want from life and whom they truly love.
cast: Amaia Salamanca, Álex García, Verónica Sánchez, Álex Gadea, Vicente Romero Sánchez

name: Vikings
plot: The adventures of Ragnar Lothbrok, the greatest hero of his age. The series tells the sagas of Ragnar's band of Viking brothers and his family, as he rises to become King of the Viking tribes. As well as being a fearless warrior, Ragnar embodies the Norse traditions of devotion to the gods. Legend has it that he was a direct descendant of Odin, the god of war and warriors.
cast: Alex Høgh Andersen, Jordan Patrick Smith, Marco Ilsø, Peter Franzén, Georgia Hirst

name: After Life
plot: Tony had a perfect life. But after his wife Lisa suddenly dies, Tony changes. After contemplating taking his own life, he decides instead to live long enough to punish the world by saying and doing whatever he likes from now on.
cast: Ricky Gervais, Tom Basden, Kerry Godliman, David Bradley, Joe Wilkinson

name: Age of Samurai: Battle for Japan
plot: Dynamic reenactments and expert commentaries bring to life the tumultuous history and power struggles of a warring 16th-century feudal Japan.
cast: Elijah Bender, David Spafford, Nathan Ledbetter, David Eason, Oleg Benesch

name: DAHMER - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story
plot: This series examines the gruesome and horrific true crimes of Jeffrey Dahmer and the systemic failures that enabled one of America’s most notorious serial killers to continue his murderous spree in plain sight for over a decade.
cast: Evan Peters, Richard Jenkins, Molly Ringwald, Michael Learned, Niecy Nash-Betts

name: From Scratch
plot: Un artist găsește dragoste cu un bucătar în Italia și pornește într-o călătorie de dragoste, pierdere, rezistență și speranță care îi schimbă viața de-a lungul culturilor și continentelor.
cast: Zoe Saldaña, Eugenio Mastrandrea, Danielle Deadwyler, Judith Scott, Kellita Smith

name: Hit & Run
plot: Viața unui bărbat fericit căsătorit este răsturnată când soția lui este ucisă într-un accident misterios de lovire și fugă în Tel Aviv.  Îndurerat și confuz, el îi caută pe ucigașii soției sale, care au fugit în SUA. Cu ajutorul unui fost iubit, el descoperă adevăruri tulburătoare despre iubita lui soție și secretele pe care ea le-a ascuns.
cast: Lior Raz, Kaelen Ohm, Moran Rosenblatt, Tali Sharon, Gal Toren

name: How to Become a Tyrant
plot: The documentary series explores different political figures throughout history.
cast: Peter Dinklage

name: Marcella
plot: Marcella is shocked to the core of her being when her husband Jason leaves her unexpectedly, confessing he no longer loves her. Heartbroken, Marcella returns to the Met’s Murder Squad. Ten years ago Marcella gave up her fast-tracked police career to marry and devote her life to her family. With the abrupt end to her marriage and isolated from her 13 year old daughter and 10 year old son, Marcella throws herself into work to stop herself from falling apart.
cast: Anna Friel, Nicholas Pinnock, Ray Panthaki, Sinéad Cusack, Amanda Burton

name: Manifest
plot: După aterizarea dintr-un zbor turbulent, dar de rutină, echipajul și pasagerii zborului Montego Air 828 descoperă că au trecut cinci ani în ceea ce păreau a fi câteva ore. Pe măsură ce noile lor realități devin clare, un mister mai profund iese la iveală și unii dintre pasagerii care se întorc își dau seama curând că ar putea fi meniți pentru ceva mai mare decât au crezut vreodată posibil.
cast: Melissa Roxburgh, Josh Dallas, J.R. Ramirez, Luna Blaise, Parveen Kaur

name: Away
plot: American astronaut Emma Green must leave her husband and teenage daughter behind to command an international space crew embarking upon a treacherous mission. A series about hope, humanity and how we need one another if we are to achieve impossible things.
cast: Hilary Swank, Mark Ivanir, Ray Panthaki, Vivian Wu, Ato Essandoh

name: MINDHUNTER
plot: An agent in the FBI's Elite Serial Crime Unit develops profiling techniques as he pursues notorious serial killers and rapists.
cast: Jonathan Groff, Holt McCallany, Anna Torv, Stacey Roca

name: Queen of the South
plot: Teresa flees Mexico after her drug-runner boyfriend is murdered. Settling in Dallas, she looks to become the country's reigning drug smuggler and to avenge her lover's murder.
cast: Alice Braga, Hemky Madera, Peter Gadiot, Jamie Hector, Ryan O'Nan

name: Roman Empire
plot: This stylish mix of documentary and historical epic chronicles the reign of Commodus, the emperor whose rule marked the beginning of Rome's fall.
cast: Sean Bean

name: The Good Doctor
plot: Shaun Murphy, a young surgeon with autism and savant syndrome, relocates from a quiet country life to join a prestigious hospital's surgical unit. Unable to personally connect with those around him, Shaun uses his extraordinary medical gifts to save lives and challenge the skepticism of his colleagues.
cast: Freddie Highmore, Fiona Gubelmann, Will Yun Lee, Christina Chang, Paige Spara

name: The Royals
plot: Drama about a fictional British Royal family set in modern day London, who inhabit a world of opulence and regal tradition that caters to any and every desire, but one that also comes with a price tag of duty, destiny and intense public scrutiny.
cast: Elizabeth Hurley, William Moseley, Alexandra Park, Tom Austen, Victoria Ekanoye

name: Godless
plot: A ruthless outlaw terrorizes the West in search of a former member of his gang, who’s found a new life in a quiet town populated only by women.
cast: Jack O'Connell, Michelle Dockery, Scoot McNairy, Merritt Wever, Thomas Brodie-Sangster

name: Anatomy of a Scandal
plot: Sophie's privileged life as the wife of powerful politician James unravels when scandalous secrets surface — and he stands accused of a shocking crime.
cast: Sienna Miller, Rupert Friend, Michelle Dockery, Naomi Scott, Josette Simon

name: Ancient Apocalypse
plot: Jurnalistul Graham Hancock călătorește pe glob căutând dovezi ale unor civilizații misterioase, pierdute, care datează din ultima epocă de gheață.
cast: Graham Hancock

name: Bridgerton
plot: Wealth, lust, and betrayal set in the backdrop of Regency era England, seen through the eyes of the powerful Bridgerton family.

name: Cealalta sotie
plot: Ceylan (Aybüke Yilmaz), acuzată pe nedrept de crimă, este forțată să devină „kuma”, a doua soție a lui Karan (Emre Özmen), bărbatul pe care îl iubește și fratele victimei. Luptând să-și dovedească nevinovăția în mijlocul presiunilor din jur, ea încearcă să-și trăiască povestea, dar e prinsă între pasiune, durere și speranță. În cele din urmă, iubirea și adevărul sunt singurele ei arme
cast: Aybüke Yılmaz, Emre Özmen, Hilal Tüfek, Ufuk Kaplan, Rızacan Durmuş

name: Fugi
plot: Un tată disperat, aflat în căutarea fiicei sale fugare, ajunge implicat într-un caz de crimă și dă peste secrete care i-ar putea distruge familia pentru totdeauna
cast: James Nesbitt, Ellie de Lange, Minnie Driver, Ellie Henry, Adrian Greensmith

name: Power Couple România – La bine şi la greu
plot: Power Couple România – La bine şi la greu este un concurs de tip reality show, care dezvăluie cum funcționează relațiile perechilor de competitori la bine, dar mai ales la greu. Cuplurile se vor confrunta cu teste extreme sau situații comice care vor scoate la iveală cât de bine se cunosc cu adevărat partenerii, câtă încredere au, de fapt, unul în celălalt și care sunt punctele tari ale relației lor, dar mai ales cele vulnerabile. Dani Oțil se alătură în calitate de prezentator al show-ului. Oana Matache și iubitul ei, Radu Siffredi, Tudor Ionescu, solistul Fly Project, și soția lui, Ana, Chef Roxana Blenche și soțul ei, Cătălin, Daiana Anghel, consultant beauty, și soțul ei, Chef Sorin Gonțea, Emi (Noaptea Târziu) și soția lui, Mădălina, soții Gabriela și Cristi Iacob, Lino Golden și logodnica lui, Delia, CRBL și soția lui, Elena, soții Eliza și Cosmin Natanticu sunt cele 9 perechi care vor trece prin situații incredibile în cea mai incitantă competiție a cuplurilor
cast: Otil Dani

name: Desafio: Aventura
plot: 24 de concurenți pornesc într-o experiență care le va testa curajul, rezistența și spiritul de echipă, în lupta pentru marele premiu de 150.000 de euro. Împărțiți în trei echipe – Norocoșii, Visătorii și Luptătorii – concurenții se vor lupta pentru teritorii, într-o aventură plină de adrenalină și provocări

name: Survivor Romania 2026
plot: Survivor este unul dintre show-urile de televiziune care au scris istorie în întreaga lume! Reality show-ul care a demonstrat că imposibilul există va prinde o altă dimensiune, exclusiv, în Universul Antena. Concurenții vor trăi pe o insulă izolată, vor lupta pentru supraviețuire, vor forma alianțe și vor trece prin cele mai dure probe pentru marele trofeu. Adi Vasile prezintă Survivor România, cel mai intens test al rezistenței și al curajului
cast: Daniel Pavel

name: HIS & HERS
plot: Doi soți înstrăinați — unul detectiv, celălalt reporter de știri — încearcă fiecare să rezolve o crimă, fiind convinși că celălalt este principalul suspect
cast: Tessa Thompson, Jon Bernthal, Pablo Schreiber, Crystal R. Fox, Sunita Mani

name: Spitalul
plot: Personalul Centrului Medical de Traume din Pittsburgh lucrează non-stop pentru a salva vieți într-un departament de urgențe supraaglomerat și subfinanțat
cast: Noah Wyle, Patrick Ball, Katherine LaNasa, Supriya Ganesh, Fiona Dourif

name: Povestea slujitoarei
plot: Într-un viitor distopic, o femeie este forțată să trăiască drept concubină sub un regim teocratic fundamentalist, unde libertatea și identitatea îi sunt reduse la tăcere
cast: Elisabeth Moss, Yvonne Strahovski, Samira Wiley

name: The Originals
plot: Serial derivat din „The Vampire Diaries”, care urmărește familia Mikaelson — vampiri vechi de milenii, însetați de putere — hotărâți să-și recucerească orașul pe care l-au întemeiat, New Orleans, și să-i supună pe toți cei care le-au greșit de-a lungul timpului
cast: Joseph Morgan, Daniel Gillies, Charles Michael Davis, Riley Voelkel, Yusuf Gatewood
